title: centaurea kurdica subsp. kurdica
intro: Centaurea kurdica subsp. kurdica, a perennial plant species within the Asteraceae family, is commonly known as Kurdish knapweed or Kurdish scabious. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal activities. In herbal preparations, Centaurea kurdica subsp. kurdica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
